articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo announces 'The Unraveled Tour' across US, Europe, UK
articles.description: Olivia Rodrigo has announced 'The Unraveled Tour,' a huge 65-date global tour across North America, Europe, and the UK. Kicking off in September, the tour is promoted by Live Nation and will feature various opening acts on select dates.

articles.title: 'The Traitors' leads nominations for 8th Critics' Choice Real TV Awards
articles.description: The Critics' Choice Association revealed nominees for the eighth annual Real TV Awards, with 'The Traitors' leading for a third year with six nods. 'Dancing with the Stars' follows with four, and Netflix earned 18 nominations for various shows.

articles.title: Preity Zinta reacts after Punjab Kings lose first IPL match to Rajasthan Royals: ‘Koi na, lot more games ahead of us’
articles.description: Rajasthan Royals ended Punjab Kings' unbeaten run in IPL 2026, defeating them by six wickets on Tuesday. Preity Zinta is still hopeful for the best.

articles.description: On Irrfan Khan’s sixth death anniversary, filmmakers Shoojit Sircar and Vishal Bhardwaj share rare anecdotes from Piku and Omkara, celebrating the late actor’s legacy.

articles.title: ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ Rotten Tomatoes score surprises fans — Is the sequel better than the original? Here’s the early review
articles.description: The Devil Wears Prada 2 arrives in theaters Friday, bringing back Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci to the fashion world that made the 2006 original a pop culture favorite. Early reviews and fan reactions suggest a polished, familiar sequel that leans on its star power, designer aesthetics and a storyline centered on print media struggling to stay relevant in the digital age.

articles.title: SRK announces release date of Saif Ali Khan's 'Kartavya'
Salman to begin shooting for Raj and DK’s film from Oct 2026
articles.description: Salman Khan is set to begin Raj and DK’s superhero film in October 2026, with pre-production underway. The big-budget project targets a global audience, with casting still in progress. Meanwhile, he is shooting an untitled Vamshi Paidipally film, co-starring Nayanthara, slated for Eid 2027.

articles.title: Naga Chaitanya confirms ‘Bangarraju’ sequel, teases reunion with Nagarjuna on screen
articles.description: Naga Chaitanya has confirmed plans for a 'Bangarraju' sequel, exciting fans eager to see him reunite with his father, Nagarjuna, on screen. The father-son duo has previously starred in three successful films. Chaitanya also discussed navigating their professional relationship, balancing creative input with Nagarjuna's final decisions as producer. Meanwhile, Chaitanya is also gearing up for his supernatural thriller, 'Vrushakarma'.

articles.title: Saif Ali Khan-Led Kartavya Streaming On Netflix From May 15

Kartavya OTT Release Date: When And Where To Watch Saif Ali Khan's Cop Series Backed By Shah Rukh Khan
articles.description: Kartavya, starring Saif Ali Khan and backed by Shah Rukh Khan’s Red Chillies Entertainment, premieres on Netflix in May 15. The cop drama marks Saif’s return to the crime genre after Sacred Games.

articles.title: Akshay Kesari set caught fire due to no safety measures
articles.description: A fire broke out on the set of Akshay Kumar’s 'Kesari' during a 2018 climax shoot, destroying it and causing losses of Rs 8 crore. SFX supervisor Vishal Tyagi said there were no safety measures, and the crew watched helplessly for two hours. No casualties were reported.

articles.title: Yami Gautam says Dhurandhar's success tells ‘it was always about scripts’; reveals Aditya Dhar is ‘unaffected’ by it
articles.description: Yami Gautam emphasised that Dhurandhar's success reflected a shift towards quality storytelling, while she and Aditya remain humble and grateful.

articles.title: Amazon Prime Video drops Lukkhe trailer, promises high-energy mix of music and crime
articles.description: Amazon Prime Video has unveiled the trailer for its upcoming original series Lukkhe, promising a high-energy mix of music, crime and emotion. Blending rap, romance and rivalry, the show is set to deliver a fast-paced story driven by ambition and personal conflict.

articles.title: Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas Gets Married To Kavya Reddy In Tirumala - See Pictures
articles.description: Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas married Kavya Reddy in a traditional Tirumala ceremony attended by family and well-wishers. The simple, spiritual wedding followed Sanatana Dharma rituals, with a grand Hyderabad reception planned for May 1.

articles.title: He became an overnight star after a hit. Suffered brain stroke, Salman Khan paid his medical bills. Now, he is making reels and looking for genuine work
articles.description: Actor Rahul Roy, known for Aashiqui, is back in the spotlight with viral social media reels post-brain stroke. Facing criticism and trolling, he recently defended his work, citing financial needs and pending legal matters. He appealed for genuine work opportunities, emphasising resilience and dignity after his health crisis. Read on to know more about his journey.

articles.title: 'Dhruva Natchathiram' prepares for release; Gautham Menon and Vikram's long-pending film aims for May 27
articles.description: Gautham Menon's long-delayed film 'Dhruva Natchathiram,' starring Vikram, is targeting a May 27 release. Director Menon has submitted details to the court to clear outstanding dues, a crucial step towards resolving financial hurdles. If pending payments are settled promptly, fans can finally anticipate this star-studded project hitting theatres after years of anticipation.

articles.title: Zanai Bhosle Reveals Her Phone Wallpaper Is A Picture With Late Grandmother Asha Bhosle
articles.description: The picture on the wallpaper appears to be captured during a celebratory moment, showing Asha Bhosle dressed in an elegant light-coloured saree.

articles.description: The entire batch of fake paneer was destroyed as per protocol.

articles.title: Bengaluru doctor shares his worst clinic incident: 'Charged so much fee but no antibiotics'
articles.description: Doctors face challenges as patients often expect antibiotics even when not needed. A Bengaluru doctor's experience with a patient demanding antibiotics for a dry cough, despite a GERD diagnosis, illustrates this growing disconnect. Misinformation from online sources fuels these unrealistic expectations. This trend strains patient-doctor trust and complicates evidence-based medical practice.

articles.title: Bipasha Basu, Karan Singh Grover Celebrate 10 Years Of Marriage, Daughter Devi Completes Adorable Family Pictures
articles.description: Karan Singh Grover and Bipasha Basu are celebrating their 10th marriage anniversary today. On the special occasion, KSG posted a video on his social media handle expressing his immense love for his wife, calling her his "heartbeat" and "angel."

articles.title: IPL 2026 GT vs RCB Live Streaming: When and where to watch Gujarat Titans vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru
articles.description: IPL 2026 GT vs RCB Live Stream: The Gujarat Titans are set to host the Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the Narendra Modi Stadium today, April 30. With both teams fighting for crucial points in Match 42 of IPL 2026, find out where to catch the live telecast on TV and how to stream the action for free on your mobile or smart TV.

articles.description: The 23-year-old star has learned to be "patient" when it comes to her love life.

articles.title: Hot Scoop: Is Pooja Hegde dating a Bollywood actor?
articles.description: Pan India actress and former beauty queen Pooja Hegde is in news, and this time it is for her personal life. Rumour mills are abuzz with the hot new scoop about her dating life. It is being reported by several media portals that Pooja is currently in a relationship with actor Rohan Mehra.

articles.title: Neha Sharma TROLLED for charging Rs 299 for Instagram subscription; Netizens react
articles.description: In a bold step into the world of digital subscriptions, actress Neha Sharma has launched a paid Instagram service that charges fans Rs 299 monthly for exclusive access to her content. With almost 10,000 devoted subscribers, she has made around Rs 29 lakh. Critics have derisively dubbed her offering 'OnlyFans Lite,' while her supporters champion her entrepreneurial spirit. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Esther says Venkatesh couldn’t recreate a scene
articles.description: Anticipation is high for 'Drishyam 3', reuniting Mohanlal and Jeethu Joseph. Esther Anil recalled a challenging interrogation scene from the original, noting Venkatesh's admission that only Mohanlal could capture its emotional nuance. The film, with a star-studded cast, is slated for a May 21 release, while its Hindi remake is expected October 2, 2026.

articles.title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office collection day 42: Ranveer Singh’s film marches towards Rs 1785 crore mark as week 7 approaches
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' continues its strong box office run, crossing Rs 1780 crore globally and nearing Rs 1335 crore net in India after 42 days. Despite facing competition from new releases, the spy drama is maintaining its pace, adding Rs 1 crore on its 6th Wednesday.

articles.description: Times Music acquires Punjabi music company Catrack

articles.title: Sidharth Bhardwaj opens up about his feelings for Manisha Rani, says “I want to marry her”
articles.description: Sidharth Bhardwaj revealed his strong feelings for Manisha Rani, admitting he likes her romantically and would marry her if she reciprocates. He praised her genuine nature and fighting spirit, noting her past heartbreak. Bhardwaj explained their social media silence, stating they'll go official only if their feelings are mutual, otherwise remaining friends.

articles.title: D4vd purchased chainsaws, shovel, body bags after killing Celeste
articles.description: Singer D4vd faces grave charges including murder and sexual abuse of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. Prosecutors allege he fatally stabbed her, then purchased tools like chainsaws and a body bag to dismember and dispose of her remains. Disturbingly, her finger was allegedly severed due to a tattoo of his name.

articles.title: 'TN 2026' OTT: Where to stream Natty Subramaniam starrer
articles.description: 'TN 2026', a captivating film with Natty Subramaniam in the lead and directed by Umapathy S Ramaiah, has hit the big screens and will soon make its way to Amazon Prime Video and Aha. This inspiring tale, derived from Thambi Ramaiah's story, explores the ascent of an ordinary beeda seller to the heights of fame and influence in Pollachi.

articles.description: The Devil Wears Prada follows a young graduate who lands a job in the fashion world, forcing her to choose between ambition and personal values.

articles.title: Horoscope Tomorrow, 1st May 2026: Why The First Day Of May Could Change Everything
articles.description: Wondering what the stars have planned for you? Horoscope tomorrow for 1st May 2026 reveals a powerful mix of ambition, romance, practical decisions and emotional clarity. With energetic fire signs pushing action and the Libra Moon bringing balance, tomorrow’s horoscope signals progress in career matters, healing in relationships, and important money insights. Whether you seek love guidance, work momentum or wellness support, this horoscope for tomorrow gives all 12 zodiac signs the roadmap they need.
